headlines.title: Agreement on Iran war ‘largely negotiated,’ Trump says amid fragile ceasefire
headlines.description: Officials from the U.S. and Iran appear to be nearing a deal to end the ongoing Middle East conflict, according to public statements from President Donald Trump and officials from both nations Saturday

headlines.title: Kyle Busch died of severe pneumonia, family says
headlines.description: NASCAR legend Kyle Busch died of severe pneumonia, his family said Saturday

headlines.title: Thousands under evacuation orders in Southern California amid threat of chemical explosion
headlines.description: Thousands of people in Southern California are under evacuation orders over fears that a tank containing toxic chemicals may explode. Authorities in Orange County said they’re unable to control the valves on a tank at an aerospace manufacturing facility in Garden Grove.

headlines.title: DHS to require green card applicants to return to home countries to apply
headlines.description: The Trump administration announced that people with temporary visas seeking to adjust their immigration status to obtain green cards must return to their home countries to “do so through consular processing,” in a major change from current practice. NBC News' Jonathan Allen explains the impact and how the new requirement will be enforced.

headlines.title: A mysterious document’s long-awaited release, and pour one out for a legendary beer: The news quiz
headlines.description: The Premier League has a new champion, a late-night host signs off, and the U.S. indicts Raúl Castro.

headlines.title: India’s ‘Cockroach Janata Party’ began as a joke. Then millions joined in.
headlines.description: What began as an internet punchline is turning into something more serious

headlines.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping
headlines.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Shakira’s World Cup anthem gets star-studded video treatment
headlines.description: Pop star Shakira on Saturday posted the official music video for “Dai Dai,” the 2026 World Cup anthem featuring Burna Boy, weeks before the FIFA tournament kicks off in North America

headlines.title: Illinois school shooting plot foiled by relative who tackled the armed child, officials say
headlines.description: An Illinois school shooting plot was foiled Friday after a relative spotted a boy with a firearm and called 911, according to the Will County Sheriff’s Office

headlines.title: Agreement on Iran war ‘largely negotiated,’ Trump says amid fragile ceasefire
headlines.description: Officials from the U.S. and Iran appear to be nearing a deal to end the ongoing Middle East conflict, according to public statements from President Donald Trump and officials from both nations Saturday

headlines.title: From solar to charcoal, Cubans look for alternatives amid outages and fuel shortages
headlines.description: Some Cubans who’ve been able to buy solar panels say it’s a game changer, but most rely on other alternatives including charcoal, despite health concerns and the steep cost.
